result.reasoning: The user asks how many methods in the final version of the class for backend C Types implementation have arguments other than only self, name, and/or sub, as of July 2023, in the documentation for the Python library that replaced Theano (PyTensor). The tool call history shows that in step 3, CLinkerType method signatures were extracted from PyTensor rel‑2.14.2 documentation. The extracted signatures are: c_code(self, node, name, inputs, outputs, sub), c_support_code(self), c_compile_args(self), c_headers(self), c_libraries(self), c_init_code(self), c_cleanup_code(self), c_code_cache_version(self). Only c_code has parameters beyond self, name, and/or sub (it includes node, inputs, outputs). All other seven methods have only self (or no parameters beyond self). Therefore, the count is 1. The answer is a number, so no sentence‑casing fallback applies. Applied casing rule: not applicable (numeric answer).
